markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Refine reporting to show the ROI of GrowthX's work.](https://fathom.video/share/ivHr-xsW89d3PMGcc3xDNENpNi4Ar_bN?tab=summary&timestamp=302.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Reporting Must Show ROI:** Reports must shift from simple snapshots to trend analysis, connecting content to leads to justify the significant investment to leadership.](https://fathom.video/share/ivHr-xsW89d3PMGcc3xDNENpNi4Ar_bN?tab=summary&timestamp=302.0)
  - [**Focus on High-Value Leads:** Prioritize sales-driven leads (\~$1k/mo plans) over low-touch self-serve buyers (\~$100/mo plans).](https://fathom.video/share/ivHr-xsW89d3PMGcc3xDNENpNi4Ar_bN?tab=summary&timestamp=316.0)
  - [**Check That Tool Needs Refinement:** The new LLM monitoring tool requires curation to focus on relevant, high-intent queries (e.g., "best call center") and filter out low-value ones.](https://fathom.video/share/ivHr-xsW89d3PMGcc3xDNENpNi4Ar_bN?tab=summary&timestamp=1006.0)
  - [**New Data Contact:** Volodomir is the new technical contact for GA4 and event tracking, replacing Julian.](https://fathom.video/share/ivHr-xsW89d3PMGcc3xDNENpNi4Ar_bN?tab=summary&timestamp=244.0)

## Topics

### Reporting Gaps & New Requirements

  - [**Problem:** Current reports are static snapshots that don't connect activities to outcomes, making it hard to prove ROI.](https://fathom.video/share/ivHr-xsW89d3PMGcc3xDNENpNi4Ar_bN?tab=summary&timestamp=213.0)
  - [**Requirement:** Reports must show trends over several months to link content production to traffic and lead generation.](https://fathom.video/share/ivHr-xsW89d3PMGcc3xDNENpNi4Ar_bN?tab=summary&timestamp=482.0)
  - [**Specific Gaps:**](https://fathom.video/share/ivHr-xsW89d3PMGcc3xDNENpNi4Ar_bN?tab=summary&timestamp=482.0)
      - [**Context:** Show data relative to prior periods.](https://fathom.video/share/ivHr-xsW89d3PMGcc3xDNENpNi4Ar_bN?tab=summary&timestamp=482.0)
      - [**Attribution:** Connect traffic sources (keywords, referrals) to conversions.](https://fathom.video/share/ivHr-xsW89d3PMGcc3xDNENpNi4Ar_bN?tab=summary&timestamp=783.0)
      - [**Analysis:** Provide insights beyond raw data pulls.](https://fathom.video/share/ivHr-xsW89d3PMGcc3xDNENpNi4Ar_bN?tab=summary&timestamp=747.0)
      - [**Conversion Tracking:** Report on key events like Calendly bookings, not just generic clicks.](https://fathom.video/share/ivHr-xsW89d3PMGcc3xDNENpNi4Ar_bN?tab=summary&timestamp=636.0)

### Smith.ai's Business Model & Lead Strategy

  - [**Dual Buyer Funnel:**](https://fathom.video/share/ivHr-xsW89d3PMGcc3xDNENpNi4Ar_bN?tab=summary&timestamp=316.0)
      - [**Sales-Driven:** High-value leads for white-glove service, generating \~$1,000/month plans.](https://fathom.video/share/ivHr-xsW89d3PMGcc3xDNENpNi4Ar_bN?tab=summary&timestamp=316.0)
      - [**Self-Serve:** Low-value buyers for smaller plans (\~$100/month).](https://fathom.video/share/ivHr-xsW89d3PMGcc3xDNENpNi4Ar_bN?tab=summary&timestamp=316.0)
  - [**Strategic Focus:** Prioritize sales-driven leads, as they represent the vast majority of revenue.](https://fathom.video/share/ivHr-xsW89d3PMGcc3xDNENpNi4Ar_bN?tab=summary&timestamp=347.0)
  - [**Pricing Test:** A/B testing the pricing page to feature annual plans, targeting more committed, larger small businesses.](https://fathom.video/share/ivHr-xsW89d3PMGcc3xDNENpNi4Ar_bN?tab=summary&timestamp=420.0)

### Check That Tool Feedback

  - [**Tool Overview:** GrowthX's new tool monitors Smith.ai's visibility in LLM search results.](https://fathom.video/share/ivHr-xsW89d3PMGcc3xDNENpNi4Ar_bN?tab=summary&timestamp=876.0)
  - [**Feedback:** The tool needs refinement to focus on relevant, high-intent queries.](https://fathom.video/share/ivHr-xsW89d3PMGcc3xDNENpNi4Ar_bN?tab=summary&timestamp=1006.0)
      - [**Example:** "best call center" is a high-value query; "AI agents trained" is low-value.](https://fathom.video/share/ivHr-xsW89d3PMGcc3xDNENpNi4Ar_bN?tab=summary&timestamp=1234.0)
  - [**Action:** A junior analyst (e.g., Usman) should curate the monitored prompts.](https://fathom.video/share/ivHr-xsW89d3PMGcc3xDNENpNi4Ar_bN?tab=summary&timestamp=1140.0)
  - [**Technical Questions:**](https://fathom.video/share/ivHr-xsW89d3PMGcc3xDNENpNi4Ar_bN?tab=summary&timestamp=1183.0)
      - [How does the tool avoid search bias (e.g., from a bot's own history)?](https://fathom.video/share/ivHr-xsW89d3PMGcc3xDNENpNi4Ar_bN?tab=summary&timestamp=1208.0)
      - [Does the bot simulate geo-tagged searches?](https://fathom.video/share/ivHr-xsW89d3PMGcc3xDNENpNi4Ar_bN?tab=summary&timestamp=1183.0)

### Data & Tracking Infrastructure

  - [**Smith.ai's Data Stack:**](https://fathom.video/share/ivHr-xsW89d3PMGcc3xDNENpNi4Ar_bN?tab=summary&timestamp=1391.0)
      - [**Analytics:** GA4, Amplitude.](https://fathom.video/share/ivHr-xsW89d3PMGcc3xDNENpNi4Ar_bN?tab=summary&timestamp=1391.0)
      - [**CRM:** Salesforce (captures Calendly UTMs).](https://fathom.video/share/ivHr-xsW89d3PMGcc3xDNENpNi4Ar_bN?tab=summary&timestamp=1398.0)
  - [**Lead Capture:** Calendly bookings are the primary lead source; post-purchase surveys are secondary.](https://fathom.video/share/ivHr-xsW89d3PMGcc3xDNENpNi4Ar_bN?tab=summary&timestamp=1391.0)
  - [**New Contact:** Volodomir is the new technical contact for GA4 and event tracking.](https://fathom.video/share/ivHr-xsW89d3PMGcc3xDNENpNi4Ar_bN?tab=summary&timestamp=244.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Andi:**](https://fathom.video/share/ivHr-xsW89d3PMGcc3xDNENpNi4Ar_bN?tab=summary&timestamp=1448.0)
      - [Revise reporting to show trends and ROI, connecting content to leads.](https://fathom.video/share/ivHr-xsW89d3PMGcc3xDNENpNi4Ar_bN?tab=summary&timestamp=482.0)
      - [Provide technical details on the Check That tool's bias prevention and geo-tagging.](https://fathom.video/share/ivHr-xsW89d3PMGcc3xDNENpNi4Ar_bN?tab=summary&timestamp=1183.0)
      - [Invite Maddy to the Check That tool once the login bug is fixed.](https://fathom.video/share/ivHr-xsW89d3PMGcc3xDNENpNi4Ar_bN?tab=summary&timestamp=876.0)
  - [**Maddy:**](https://fathom.video/share/ivHr-xsW89d3PMGcc3xDNENpNi4Ar_bN?tab=summary&timestamp=1140.0)
      - [Direct Usman to curate the monitored prompts in the Check That tool.](https://fathom.video/share/ivHr-xsW89d3PMGcc3xDNENpNi4Ar_bN?tab=summary&timestamp=1140.0)
